title: Semi-Automatic Back Massager Machine
description: Motorised back massager with eccentric cam mechanism producing 30–50 Hz vibration, adjustable speed via PWM, multiple massage nodes, powered by 12 V DC gear motor.
objective: Vibration frequency 30–50 Hz adjustable; multiple massage contact nodes; variable intensity; 30 min auto-shutoff; portable 12 V battery powered.
constraints: 12 V Li-Ion battery; BOM < ₹2000; Arduino Uno speed control; < 2 kg weight.
supporting_fact_titles: Cam and Follower Mechanism — Displacement Profiles
design_element_titles: DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Eccentric Cam Vibration Massager Drive: 3 eccentric cams on common shaft; 12 V gear motor 500–3000 RPM via PWM.
element_usage_notes.DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control: PWM from Arduino potentiometer input sets massage intensity.
